zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Newmarche III於1226年出生在英國越可爾沃莫斯利時，他的父親John de Newmarch30歲，母親Pernel de Wormersley30歲。他於1241年與Joan Bentley在英國英格蘭德比夏爾阿希布恩結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1283年在英國越可爾朋特福拉可特 卡素享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Newmarche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Neufmarché (Seine-Maritime). See   Anglo-Norman Families  .

variants.name: Newmark
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Emanuel, Chayim, Meyer, Shlomo, Vigdor.
Americanized form of Scandinavian Nymark: habitational name from farms named with ny ‘new’ + mark ‘field’.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Neumark  .

variants.name: Anglo-Norman Families
meanings: 2  Norman, English: locative name from Martinvast (in Manche, France). See   Anglo-Norman Families  .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Newmarche III was born in 1226, in Womersley, Yorkshire, England, his father, John de Newmarch, was 30 and his mother, Pernel de Wormersley, was 30. He married Joan Bentley in 1241, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1283, in Pontefract Castle, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Newmarche III est né en 1226, à Womersley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Newmarch, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Pernel de Wormersley, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Joan Bentley en 1241, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1283, à Pontefract Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.Rise, Yorkshire, England: Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Newmarche III 1226 in Womersley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Newmarch 30 und seine Mutter Pernel de Wormersley 30. Er hat 1241 in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Bentley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1283 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Pontefract Castle, Yorkshire, England.

Lui sposato Joan Bentley nel 1241, nel Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Newmarche IIIが1226年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウオメルスリーで生まれた時，父John de Newmarchは30歳，母Pernel de Wormersleyは30歳であった。1241年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンでJoan Bentleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1283年にイギリスヨークシュアイアポンテフラクト カストルで57歳で死去した。

ko.Rise, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 리스
ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Newmarche III(이)가 1226년 영국 요르크실르 보머슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Newmarch(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Pernel de Wormersley(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1241년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 애스h보우른에서 Joan Bentley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1283년 영국 요르크실르 폰테프라크트 카스틀에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Joan Bentley em 1241, em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Rise, Yorkshire, England: рис, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Newmarche III родился в 1226 г. в местности вомирсли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Newmarch было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Pernel de Wormersley, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Bentley в 1241 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1283 г. в местности понтефракт кастл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.
